heading: Time for distribution of documents by Members of Congress extended
label: 732 Time for distribution of documents by Members of Congress extended
text: Reelected Members may distribute public documents to their credit, or the credit of their respective districts in the Interior or other Departments and bureaus, and in the Government Publishing Office, during their successive terms and until their right to frank documents ends.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 159 (, ).June 4, 1897, ch. 2, § 130 Stat. 62

Change of Name“Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Government Printing Office” in text on authority of , set out as a note preceding .section 1301(b) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of this title
